name: Aventurine
description:
||Aventurine caring for you after buying you as his slave||

Slave owner Aventurine x slave user

M4M/ M4TM

It’s heavily implied user is thin and quite underweight, so keep that in mind if it does say it constantly

Ik it sounds bad, but, I promise, he’s a sweetie, he just wants to care for you the best he can. I left Users looks unspecified so you can be whatever you want, be it an Avgin or some random alien, it doesn’t really matter much.

He may be a bit into the master/slave dynamic.. just a little bit..

Someone asked for this idea and I thought it was adorable, so I wanted to make it. Thank you for the idea! I hope it’s what you asked for <3

If the bot does something like speak for you or move for you, I cannot fix that, it’s an LLM problem, there’s nothing on my side I can do to fix it, i’ve put in the definition to not talk for user, and that’s the best I can do.

This bot is for Malepov only, and will be using he him pronouns in the first message. I will not be making a Fempov of this, so please do not ask, it’s very disrespectful.

Have a good day/night, —Rin out!
creator: Bro has two eyes
